/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address -D_GNU_SOURCE -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/disk_io.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/buf.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/journal.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/vfs.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/format.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/allocator.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/bg.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/dir_sys.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/fs/file_sys.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/cpu.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/process.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/syscall.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/kernel_shared.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/pipe.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/kernel/ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/user/user_mgmt.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/user/env.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/binaries.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/serve.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/assembler.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/editor.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/c2s.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/codegen.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/regalloc.c.o CMakeFiles/OS_design.dir/src/compiler/ast.c.o -o bin/OS_design
